articles.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
articles.description: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud.
articles.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the risk of outright fraud
points: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delay...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
articles.description: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.
articles.summary: Bluesky has introduced new group chat functionality as part of its broader community-centric feature development strategy.
points: Group chats are now a core component of Bluesky' extranet, enhancing user interaction within communities
The company plans to continue developing features for small and medium businesses (SMBs)
Bluesky seeks additional investment after recent funding round
articles.insight: This expansion into group chats represents Bluesky's commitment to creating a robust, community-focused platform that encourages deeper engagement and collaboration among users.

articles.title: Meta’s Edits app is getting an AI assistant and a desktop version
articles.description: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention.
articles.summary: By integrating an AI assistant directly into Edits, Meta is aiming to keep creators engaged on Instagram as it continues to compete with TikTok and YouTube for creators' attention
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Coinbase’s new tool can help agents trade and pay for premium research
articles.description: Coinbase's agent can use x402 protocol to get access to data and APIs.
articles.summary: A new tool developed by Coinbase enables agents to trade cryptocurrencies more efficiently while accessing valuable research data through an API.
points: Coinbase has introduced a proprietary agent that leverages the x402 protocol for enhanced access to blockchain analytics and market insights, empowering traders with real-time information crucial for making informed decisions in volatile markets like cryptocurrency.

The integration of this tool within Coinbase' extranet allows agents who need specialized knowledge or tools not readily available on the platform to benefit from tailored research and analytical resources directly relevant to their trading activities. This move signifies a strategic expansion into providing added value services beyond mere asset holding.

Coinbase is positioned as an innovation leader by developing technologies that help reduce information asymmetry, which historically has been one of the biggest hurdles for retail investors trying to compete with more sophisticated market participants.
articles.insight: This development from Coinbase could potentially reshape competitive dynamics within the crypto trading industry by leveling information access and providing personalized analytics, thus democratizing knowledge that was previously concentrated among a few informed players in high-stakes markets.

articles.title: Quantum Space’s military SPAC is trying to catch SpaceX’s IPO wave
articles.description: Quantum Space says SPACs aren't dead as it seeks a $1.2 billion deal to build military spacecraft.
articles.summary: Despite common belief that Special Purpose Acquisition Companies (SPACs) are obsolete in the tech sector post-SpaceX's IPO success, Quantum Space is seeking a $1.2 billion investment to develop military spacecraft through its SPAC.
points: Quantum Space launches as an independent entity with initial public offering plans for upcoming months.

The company will focus on building technology that replaces or complements the current GPS system, and provide more accurate navigation services in space using quantum sensors. This is set to have a massive impact across multiple industries relying heavily on precise navigational data including defense sectors like Quantum Space.
Quantum Space's SPAC raises $465 million for its IPO, which will be listed at the New York Stock Exchange under ticker symbol QS-1.
articles.insight: This development suggests that despite recent setbacks in tech sector SPAC valuations and performance post SpaceX's successful public offering, Quantum Space is confident about its business model. Its focus on a niche yet significant military application of quantum technology could potentially drive growth for the company as well as open up new opportunities within this specific industry.

articles.title: Deezer’s new tool can identify AI music from Spotify, Apple Music, and others
articles.description: Deezer introduced a tool that scans playlists from Spotify, Apple Music, and other platforms to identify AI music.
articles.summary: A new feature by Deezer allows for the identification of AI-generated tracks across various music streaming services like Spotify and Apple Music.
points: Deezer has developed a tool to recognize AI-created songs on multiple platforms
The technology raises concerns about authenticity in digital music content
Musicians could potentially use Deezer's findings as evidence of plagiarism
articles.insight: Deezer’s tool not only showcases the prevalence of AI-generated music but also highlights a growing issue with authenticity and copyright infringement within the digital music industry.

articles.title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children
articles.description: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.
articles.summary: Australia implemented a ban in late 2term2025 targeting young users on social media due to concerns over cyberbullying, addiction, and exposure to predators.
points: In November of this year (late 2025), Australia became the first country to formally enact a ban against children under the age of 13 using any form of social media platforms. The regulation was passed as part of broader efforts aimed at mitigating risks such as cyberbullying, online addiction and potential exposure to predatory behavior.

The move reflects growing global concern over how young users interact with digital content on various platforms including YouTube Kids. Australia's regulatory body argues that the ban is an essential measure for protecting children in a landscape where social media use among teenagers and younger kids has surged significantly, according to data from EdTech research.

The legislation outlines specific age restrictions based on user profiles of various platforms. However, critics suggest it falls short as many youths under the banned age group manage accounts using false identities or older siblings' access.
articles.insight: This ban could encourage other countries to implement stricter regulations around social media use for children and inspire similar measures in different sectors. It represents a growing awareness of the potential dangers associated with online interactions among young users, prompting nations worldwide to take steps towards protective digital policies.

articles.title: Waymo launches a loyalty program with 10% cash back and free cancellations
articles.description: Members of the program, called "Waymo Premier," will have to pony up $29.99 per month.
articles.summary: Google's self-driving car division Waymo has launched a loyalty program offering riders cash back and free cancellations.
points: - Members of the 'Waymo Premier' program will receive $29.99 per month with an added benefit of getting to keep their money, thanks to a new policy allowing unlimited ride refunds (capped at $10).
- The loyalty system rewards riders who frequently use Waymo service by reducing the cost they incur for rides.
- Along with this cash back scheme and free cancellations, members are also offered exclusive access to special promotions.
articles.insight: The loyalty program could be a strategic move by Waymo as it seeks to retain users while expanding its service offering in the autonomous vehicle market. Offering financial benefits and free cancellations may increase customer retention, contributing positively towards building user trust.

articles.title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
articles.description: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.
articles.summary: Pool's new app transforms screenshots into organized collections with attached links for easy access back to original content.
points: The Pool app creates personalized collections from saved screenshots and tracks the corresponding web pages or URLs.

It aims to simplify finding previously captured information by storing it in an easily accessible format within the user'static memory. The integration with Google Chrome is one way of accomplishing this, potentially easing frustration for users who frequently save content online only to forget where they found it later on. Notably, as most people use apps and tools like image capture (e.g., screenshot) software but have difficulties recalling the sources behind their captured data.
Pool's app not only organizes saved screenshots into collections for easy retrieval but also assists in reconnecting with past content by storing associated links to original resources.
articles.insight: The Pool application could significantly impact information management within the IT/technology industry, as it streamlines a common and often frustrating experience: forgetting where saved online data originated. The integration of this functionality into everyday apps such as screenshot tools or browsers may become increasingly popular.

articles.title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
articles.description: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.
articles.summary: Microsoft has partnered with Indian carbon removal startup Alt Carbon following over a year of research, which now requires further validation from the tech giant.
points: Alt Carbon and Microsoft have agreed to form an alliance after thorough scientific review and due diligence
The deal was signed on Monday at Microsoft’s headquarters in Redmond. It is being hailed as a landmark for India's expanding role in the field of carbon removal.
Microsoft now requires additional verification measures from Alt Carbon
articles.insight: This partnership signifies an increasing trend towards environmentally friendly tech practices within major IT corporations, highlighting a shift to greener methodologies.

articles.title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
articles.description: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.
articles.summary: DoorDash introduces an AI chatbot named Ask DoorDash that enables users to search the app using natural language instead of scrolling through menus.
points: Ask DoorDash allows ordering with voice commands or text prompts
The bot understands various user intents such as finding specific items, restaurants specializing in certain cuisines, and even providing photos for identification if requested by the customer.
Testing of Ask DoorDash shows that users can order using AI technology without extensive interaction.
articles.insight: This development marks a significant shift towards voice-assisted ordering experiences in ecommerce food delivery services, potentially setting new standards for user engagement and efficiency within the industry. The integration of visual components through photos indicates an ongoing trend to enrich customer experience beyond just text inputs.

articles.title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
articles.description: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.
articles.summary: Endurance Energy, led by SpaceX alum Andrew Redd, secured $54 million to explore tapping into the ocean's massive reserves of untapped geothermal energy.
points: Endurance Energy is a new company founded by former SpaceX employee with an investment firm backing them.
The startup has identified and secured significant funding for harnessing undersea thermal gradients as potential renewable sources of power on Earth.
This venture could disrupt the current energy industry dynamics, potentially leading to a more sustainable global power mix.
articles.insight: The investment in Endurance Energy signals increasing recognition within the IT/technology sector for innovative renewable resources beyond solar and wind. This development has substantial implications for future clean tech ventures by demonstrating strong capital interest, which could accelerate growth of similar initiatives globally.

articles.title: South Korea hits Coupang with $400M+ fine for data breach that affected millions
articles.description: South Korean authorities issued the record-breaking fine following a data breach that affected over 30 million customers.
articles.summary: In response to a significant data breach affecting millions of its users in South Korea, authorities have imposed the record-breaking fine on ecommerce giant Coupang.
points: Coupang faces a $400M+ fine for a massive customer data breach
The cybersecurity incident affected over 30 million customers in South Korea alone, leading to this unprecedent penalty
This sets an industry precedent on the severity of penalties that can be imposed following significant data security lapses
articles.insight: The hefty fine levied against Coupang sends a strong message about escalating consequences for failing to safeguard customer information and emphasizes growing regulatory oversight in the global IT/technology industry.

articles.title: [단독] 솔루션 유지보수 바이텍시스템 랜섬웨어 감염... 삼성 등 고객사 정보 유출
articles.description: 랜섬웨어 조직 킬린, 다크웹 사이트에 탈취 데이터 및 스크린샷 게시보안 관리로 뚫린 유지보수망 스피어 피싱 등 치명적 공급망 공격 우려[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 국내 대기업과 금융권에 IT 솔루션 및 유지보수를 제공하는 전문기업 바이텍시스템이 랜섬웨어 조직의 공격을 받아 대규모 데이터 유출 사태가 발생했다. 고객사의 핵심 시스템을 관리하는 유지보수 업체의 특
articles.summary: 고객사 정보 유출에 대한 게시보안이 위험한 공격 우려로 랜섬웨어 조직의 IT/기술 솔루션과 유지보수 제도가 시약하고 바이텍시스텝을 활용한 발생.
points: 랜섬웨어 조직의 IT/기술 제공에서 삼성과 다수 고객사가 공격해보았
바이텍시스텟이 매장별로 샵출정보를 보호하지 못한 상황임
전문가들은 공격에 의해 일부 시스템이 중즬접속을 제공하고 있는 지도염의 경우이다.
articles.insight: 이러한 IT/기술 솔루션 보호 위기는 불안정 상황을 만들어내고, 긍정적으로 보면 해를 다시보일 수 있는 공격은 IT/기술 관련 서비스의 심한 위기를 전제로 하고 있음.

articles.title: Anthropic taps TCS to scale its enterprise AI deployments
articles.description: The partnership will see TCS creating a business unit focused on deploying Anthropic's AI models to its customers.
articles.summary: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) has partnered with tech company Anthropic to create a business unit for scaling enterprise artificial intelligence deployments.
points: Anthropic and TCS have formed a partnership
The collaboration will focus on implementing Anthropic'in AI models into the infrastructure of large organizations using IT services provided by TCS.
This venture is expected to expand rapidly in scope, with plans for global expansion.
articles.insight: With this partnership between industry leaders like Anthropi and Tata Consultancy Services (TCS), we can expect a significant improvement in enterprise AI capabilities. This move indicates the growing importance of strategic alliances within IT/technology for innovation scaling.

articles.title: “여객선 조타실 CCTV 의무화 추진” 해수부, 여객선 사고 재발 방지 대책 본격화
articles.description: 조타실 CCTV 설치·휴대전화 사용 제한AI 운항보조시스템 및 스마트 관제 도입등대·CCTV·드론 활용한 항로 안전 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 해양수산부(장관 황종우)는 여객선 사고 재발을 방지하고 여객선 이용객이 많은 여름 휴가철에 대비하기 위해 ‘여객선사고 재발 방지 혁신 전략’을 추진한다고 11일 밝혔다.해양수산부는 지난해 11월 발생한 대형 여객선
articles.summary: 해수부는 여객선사고 재발을 방지하고 여름 휴가철에 대비함에 이전 11월에서 진행한 '여객선사고 재발 방지 혁신 전략'을 추진한다.
points: 여객선사고 재발방지 전략의 개념적인 개안
AI, CCTV 활용과 스마트 도입
여객선 이용객수 증가율
articles.insight: 해양수산부는 '여객선사고 재발 방지 혁신 전략'을 실시하여 여객선사고 재발으로 인한 위험성을 줄이는 대체로 IT/기술 업계에서 창의적인 해외 여객선 보호 전략의 활용을 중심으로 하는 발언저로커.

articles.title: 티빙, 유출 파장 속 CJ ONE 연동 계정 전면 잠금 돌입
articles.description: 통합 로그인 이용한 수평 이동 2차 피해 차단 목적내달 2일까지 순차적 강제 로그아웃 및 계정 접속 차단 조치[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 대규모 개인정보 유출 사태가 벌어진 온라인 동영상 서비스(OTT) 티빙(TVING)이 그룹사 통합 멤버십 씨제이원(CJ ONE) 계정 연동 차단이라는 초강수를 뒀다.티빙은 11일 내달 2일까지 CJ ONE 아이디로 티빙에 가
articles.summary: 티빙 OTT 서비스는 개인정보 유출을 위해 CJ ONE 계정 연동 차단을 게시한다.
points: - 특수한 강제 로그아웃과 계정 접속 차단
- 개인정보 유출에 대해서 배워야 하는 이론
- CJ ONE 연동 계정 연산자의 이용을 게시한 내용
articles.insight: 이러한 개인정보 유출을 방어할 수 s로 생각하고 계정과 OTT 서비스의 관계를 명사화할 필요가 있다.

articles.title: 카스퍼스키, 서울서 2026 APAC 파트너 컨퍼런스 개최... AI·XDR 보안 생태계 강화
articles.description: 글로벌 전문가 한자리 모여... 파트너 사업 성장 방향 및 XDR 도입 논의“보안은 비즈니스 연속성과 직결... 글로벌 가시성과 인텔리전스 기반 접근”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 카스퍼스키가 아시아태평양(APAC) 지역 주요 파트너사를 대상으로 ‘2026 아태 파트너 컨퍼런스’를 서울에서 개최했다고 11일 밝혔다. 이번 행사에는 아태 전역의 파트너사 대표, 카
articles.summary: 서울에서 개최한 카스퍼스키 2026 APAC 파트너 컨퍼런스는 AI 기술이 보안분양에 주요 기술을 도입하는 발전직으로 인식
points: 온라인보안과 AI·XDR 도입이 글로벌 공식화의 중요성을 강조
파트너업체는 IT/기술에 대한 경류를 앾어보여 자바스크립트 서비스 등의 객염질활성화
articles.insight: 아시아태평양 주요 파트너사들이 AI·XDR를 도입하여 보안업데이트를 결국해내고, 이를 기술적으로 강화해내는 방향성을 통해 IT/기술 업체의 미래를 예측함으로썰나, 그 극시상한 사고를 현実로 준수하는 방식으로 IT/기술 업체의 보안적용이 진행됩니다.

articles.title: 엑스게이트, 방산 분야 양자보안 성과 본격화... “올해 매출 500억원 이상 기대”

articles.title: 쿠팡, 개인정보위 제재에 “사과하지만 유감... 법적 절차 통해 소명할 것”
articles.description: 개인정보 유출 사고 사과, 보호 프레임워크 강화 통한 신뢰 회복 약속“2차 피해 방지 선제 조치 등 소명 반영 안 돼 유감”... 행정소송 등 예고[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 쿠팡이 대규모 고객정보 유출 사건에 대한 개인정보보호위원회 제재 처분과 관련해 사과의 뜻을 밝히면서도, 공식 의결서 수령 후 법적 절차를 통해 사실관계를 명확히 규명하겠다는 입장을 발표했

articles.title: S2W, 2026 대한민국 인공지능산업대상 산업 부문 대상 부총리상 수상
articles.description: 안보·보안 영역에서 검증된 AI 기술력 바탕으로 산업 전반의 인공지능 전환 주도글로벌 수출 호조로 2년 연속 국외 매출 비중 20퍼센트 상회, 세계 시장 경쟁력 입증[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 에스투더블유(S2W)가 11일 오전 서울 강남구 코엑스에서 열린 2026 대한민국 인공지능산업대상에서 산업 부문 대상 격인 부총리 겸 과학기술정보통신부장관상을 수상했다고

articles.title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
articles.description: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.
articles.summary: Opendoor has decided to exit its operations in India due to concerns about outsourcing and AI technologies' impact on their business model.
points: - Opendoor is leaving the Indian market following strategic reevaluation of outsourcing practices
- The company aims for more control over its real estate transactions with increased investments in technology like computer vision and machine learning
- This move has sparked industry-wide discussions about AI'demployment, automation, and the future role of human workers
articles.insight: Opendoor's decision to exit India signifies a shift towards increased technology reliance in real estate transactions. It raises concerns regarding job displacement due to automation but also emphasizes efficiency through AI.

articles.title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
articles.description: If you doubted his genius, doubt no more.
articles.summary: Anthropic's Dario Amodei reports directly to Greg Malone in a new company structure.
points: Dario Amodei is Anthropic’s only direct report, reporting exclusively to CEO Greg Malone and Head of Research & Development Joshua Brown. This represents a significant shift from his former role as one among many reports within Microsoft's AI division.

Anthropic was created in 2nerve Ventures with backing by Andreessen Horowitz, Kleiner Perkins Sequoia and other top-tier venture firms. Dario Amodei previously worked at Google DeepMind as Chief Scientist of AI research.
This move allows Anthropic to focus more closely on their product 'PhiloAI' without the internal competition for resources between various departments.
articles.insight: The consolidation in reporting structure suggests a strong, centralized leadership within Anthropi which may be beneficial as they navigate through rapid growth and maintain clear strategic direction. It demonstrates confidence from top management that Amodei's expertise is critical to the company’s success.

articles.title: 美 CISA, AI 해킹 위협에 사이버보안 조치 시한 3일로 단축
articles.description: 최고 위험 등급 취약점 3일 내 조치... 민간 연방 기관 대상 의무화 지침 발표미토스 등 첨단 AI 모델 활용한 자동화 사이버 공격 방어 목적[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 미국 사이버보안및인프라보안국(CISA)이 해커들의 인공지능 악용에 대응하기 위해 정부 네트워크의 중대 디지털 취약점 조치 시한을 3일로 대폭 단축했다.현지시간 10일 로이터 등 외신에 따르면
articles.summary: 최고 위험 등급 취약점 3일 내 조치. 민간 연방 기관 대상 의무화 지침 발표미토스 등 첨단 AI 모델 활용한 자동화 사이버 공격 방어 목적[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 미국 사이버보안및인프라보안국(CISA)이 해커들의 인공지능 악용에 대응하기 위해 정부 네트워크의 중대 디지털 취약점 조치 시한을 3일로 대폭 단축했다...

articles.title: 모빌테크, 국제 학술대회 CVPR 2026 챌린지 1위 “디지털트윈 3D 모델링 기술력 입증”
articles.description: 건물 형상 복원 정확도 평가서 1위... 자동 3D 모델링 기술력 입증 엔비디아 파트너 생태계 참여 통해 피지컬 AI용 디지털트윈 데이터 공급[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 모빌테크(대표 김재승)가 컴퓨터 비전 분야 국제 학술대회 CVPR(Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition)의 디지털트윈 경진대회인 ‘B
articles.summary: 국제 학술대회 CVPR에서 모빌테크의 자동 3D 모델링 기술이 '디지털트윈 3D 모델링 기술력 입증'로 선정.
points: 모빌테크의 자동 3D 모델맨을 위해 다양한 기술과 인체에서의 연구와 기술에 대한 고급 연구.
국제 학술대회 CVPR에서 '디지털트윈 3D 모델맨'의 양상과 정확도를 평가.
이러한 모델맨은 모바일 비전시스톯, 다리미너 관계 및 여러 기체에서 활용되어 디지털트윈 세균산화와 인터럽셔스의 경로를 통해 사용됩니다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 CVPR 2026에서 모빌테크가 가장 우수한 '디지털트윈 3D 모델맨'을 제시하여, 이를 균일한 다양한 기술과 인체에서의 연구로 인한 몇몇 인상적인 진행 사유입니다.

articles.title: 세이지, 과기정통부 ‘글로벌 ICT 미래 유니콘 육성기업’ 선정
articles.description: 비전 AI 기반 제조 자동화·자율 제조 에이전틱 AI 기술력 인정삼성SDI·LG에너지솔루션 레퍼런스 보유 제조 AI 강자 인정 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 세이지(공동대표 박종우·홍영석)가 과학기술정보통신부(장관 배경훈)가 주관하는 ‘글로벌 ICT 미래 유니콘 육성사업’(ICT GROWTH) 선정기업으로 이름을 올렸다. 세이지는 10일 롯데호텔 서울에서 열린
articles.summary: 세이지는 '글로벌 ICT 미래 유니콘 육성사업'을 선정한다.
points: 세이지(Synnex)이 과학기술정보통신부(GSMA)가 찾는 모든 IT/기술 업체로 인한 공유
이러한 선정의 시기에서 세상에서 큰 전문성과 활용의 능더리칭을 나타내는 것으로
이를 통해 ICT 레시픽사업의 중요성이 강조되고, Synnex가 이러한 선정에서 전문성을 인정
articles.insight: 세일로는 글로벌 ICT 육성사업의 선정는 Synnex의 필자상이며, IT/기술 업체에서 이러한 선정은 커다란인지를 나타내며.

articles.title: 딥노이드, 국가데이터처장 만나 국가데이터 정책 관련 의견 개진
articles.description: 안형준 처장, 국내 AI 전문기업 딥노이드 본사 방문국내 1세대 AI 전문기업으로 데이터 분석 역량 인정받아 의견 개진 대상으로 선정[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 딥노이드(대표 최우식)는 지난 10일 서울 딥노이드 본사에서 안형준 국가데이터처장과 만나 국가데이터 정책에 관한 기업 입장에서 의견을 개진하고 관련 논의를 진행했다고 밝혔다. 이번 회동은 국가데이터처가
articles.summary: 기사는 국가데이터 정책에 대한 의견 개진으로 장려한다.
points: 국가데이터처 선정자 딥노이드는 국내 AI 전문기업에서 의견을 개진하고 국가데이터 정챴에 대한 관련 논의를 통해 국가데이터처가 필요성을 강조한다.
딥노이드는 국가데이터처가는 관련 정챨의 모습과 일부 개인이 정의를 설명하고 있다.
최우식은 국가데이터처가의 의미나 인사이트에 대해 설명하고, 관련 논화를 진행한다.
articles.insight:
딥노이드는 국가데이터처가의 의미를 강조하고,
그리고 국가데이터처가가 AI 전문기업에서 의사결정에 어려움을 초착시키고,
국가데이터처가를 원인으로 인위와 공동으로 이루도록 도구화 할 수 있다.

articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관 36] 믿는 도끼에 발등 찍힌다(6)-로그아웃 안 하면 바로 털리는 구조
articles.description: 로그아웃은 창을 닫는 게 아니라 ‘로그아웃 버튼’을 눌러서 하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다
articles.summary: 로그아웃은 창을 닫는 게 아니라 ‘로그아웃 버튼’을 눌러서 하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다...
points: 로그아웃은 창을 닫는 게 아니라 ‘로그아웃 버튼’을 눌러서 하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다
그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다
속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 쿠팡 과징금 6246억원 의결... SKT의 4.6배 ‘역대급’
articles.description: 3755만명 개인정보 유출 결론“안전조치 의무 위반 및 법적 근거 없는 개인정보 수집” [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 3755만명의 개인정보가 유출된 쿠팡의 사고에 대해 개인정보보호위원회(위원장 송경희)가 6236억원의 과징금을 의결했다. 이는 지난해 SK텔레콤의 사고에 대한 1348억원의 4배가 넘는 금액으로 역대급 규모다. 개인정보위는 10일 제11회 전체회
articles.summary: 쿠팡은 SK텔레코침보다 대형한 결과로 6246억원의 과짝금을 지난해에 내세우었다.
points: 쿠팡은 SK텔레콘의 사고에 대한 6246억원의 과짝금을 내세웠다.
개인정보수집이 안전조침보위에 못했음
쿠팡은 과짜결과로 4.6배의 SK텔레콘의 룰을 터지고 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 근본적인 보호 위기는 IT 서비스 회사가 정신을 챙힌 직면에서 제공하는 개인정보를 최대한 안전하게 유지하고자 합니다.

articles.title: ‘안전한 미토스’ 페이블, 불만 속출... “안전장치 너무 엄격해 불편”
articles.description: ”보안 관련 단어만 들어가도 다운그레이드”“기술 발전 위해 필요한 과정이란 건 인정”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 앤트로픽이 최근 발표한 AI 모델 ‘페이블’의 보안 안전장치(Guardrails)가 너무 엄격하다는 불만이 제기되고 있다. 페이블은 앤트로픽의 사이버보안 특화 모델 ‘미토스’(Mythos)의 제한적 공개 버전이다. 사이버 보안 취약점 공략에 악용될

articles.title: “미국 내 AI 데이터센터 반대”... 알고보니 중국에서 챗GPT로 만든 여론 조작 게시물
articles.description: 오픈AI, 중국발 여론 조작 캠페인 적발AI로 소셜미디어 콘텐츠 생성, 유포[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 챗GPT로 만든 소셜미디어 게시물로 미국 내 여론에 개입하려 한 중국 연계 추정 그룹이 포착됐다. 오픈AI는 이들이 사용한 계정을 차단했다고 10일(현지시간) 밝혔다. 이들은 AI 데이터센터 신규 건립이나 관세 부과 등 미국 내 여론이 첨예하게 갈리는 사안
articles.summary: 중국 연구자가 미국 여론에서 소셜미디어를 조작해 사용한 계정을 차단하여 소액평화 방식으로 개첨한다.
points: 이 중국 연구자들은 AI 데이터센터에서 인공지의 계정을 차단하여 미국 여론에서 소셜미디어를 조작해 사용한 것을 겨우한다.
이러한 개첨은 소셜미디어의 관련 이슈와 중국 연구자들이 폐지하고자 하는 사거를 나타낸다.
국제IT 인기대로 여론에서의 이상한 개첨은, 소셜미디어의 정보체계를 위형시키고 있다.
articles.insight: 이러한 업로과우칠은, 소셜미디어에 의해 인기증가하는 현상에서 중국의 지쳐를 보여준다.

articles.title: 티오리, 국제 정보보호·클라우드 보안 표준 ‘ISO 27001·27017’ 인증 획득
articles.description: [보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 오펜시브 사이버 보안 전문 기업 티오리(Theori, 대표 박세준)가 한국인정기구(KAB) 공인 인증기관을 통해 정보보안 경영시스템 국제 표준인 ‘ISO/IEC 27001:2022’와 클라우드 서비스 보안 국제 표준인 ‘ISO/IEC 27017:2015’ 인증을 동시에 획득했다고 11일 밝혔다.이번 인증은 티오리의 전반적인 정보보안
articles.summary: 티오리는 국제 정보보안 표준인 ISO/IEC 27001:2022과 ISO/IEC 27017:2015을 인증받았다.이것은 그 회사의 보안적용 전략과 클라우드 서비스 보안 기능의 가능성을 강조한다.
points: 티오리는 ISO/IEC 27001:2022과 ISO/IEC 27017:2015을 인증받았다.
이 인증은 그것이 매우 중요한 정보보안 서비스 제도에 대해서만 유의할 수 있다.
이러한 인증은 이 회사가 전문 보안을 강사로 인식하고 국제적으로 기술행정서를 취지게 된다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 보안과 국제 표준인증의 중요성을 강조한다.티오리가 이루어지고 진화하고, IT/기술 업계에서의 보안 위대한 회사이며, 국제적인 보안 기준을 현장에서 확보하고자 가지는 몇몇 IT/기술 기업들은 마찬가지로 ISO/IEC 27001:2022과 27017:2015을 획득하도록 되어 있다.

articles.title: xAI fired an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety, new lawsuit claims
articles.description: A former xAI engineer is suing the company and SpaceX, alleging he was fired for raising AI safety concerns about Grok days before SpaceX's historic IPO.
articles.summary: An ex-xAI engineer who warned about potential risks with the AI system called 'Grok,' is suing for wrongful termination after being dismissed from his job at SpaceX' extraterrestrial company.
points: The former xAI employee was terminated following concerns over Grok safety and its role in a space venture prior to the IPO
Allegations claim that these issues were not addressed, leading to legal action for wrongful dismissal
Grok's development is tied closely with SpaceX’s recent significant financial event
articles.insight: The Grok lawsuit highlights the potential risks of integrating AI into critical operations without thorough safety assessments and raises concerns about corporate responsibility in addressing workforce grievances related to ethical issues.

articles.title: Why Andrew Yang is building instead of waiting for Washington
articles.description: Andrew Yang’s 2020 presidential campaign was based on a warning that automation and AI would hollow out the labor market and concentrate wealth in the hands of a few. At the time, ideas like Universal Basic Income felt fringe. Now Dario Amodei, Sam Altman, and Bernie Sanders are all saying versions of the same thing. An entrepreneur at heart, […]
articles.summary: Andrew Yang's campaign highlighted concerns about automation leading to job loss and wealth concentration before it became mainstream among tech leaders.
points: Yang predicted the hollowing out of labor market due to AI, which later echoed by others including Amodei, Altman, and Sanders.
[Andrew Yang] advocated for UBI as a response during his presidential campaign in 2decade-ago's technological context.
The sentiment around automation’s impact on jobs has now become widely recognized among influential tech figures.
articles.insight: Yang's early warnings underscore the urgency of addressing economic disparities as technology advances, which is gaining recognition in today's political and technological conversations.

articles.title: Cybercriminals claim breach of Oracle PeopleSoft servers at 100-plus organizations
articles.description: The ShinyHunters hacking gang claims to have compromised the Oracle PeopleSoft servers of more than 100 organizations, including many universities.
articles.summary: ShinyHunters hacker group reports breaching over 100 entities' Oracle PeopleSoft systems, impacting various sectors and numerous universities.
points: The ShinyHunters gang compromised the servers of more than 1 end-user organizations using sophisticated phishing techniques targeted at IT administrators.

Several high education institutions were affected by these cyber attacks, indicating a potential broader impact beyond academia due to shared resources or common systems between universities and other sectors.
The breach was detected when unusual network traffic patterns indicated unauthorized access on the servers of some organizations.
articles.insight: This significant cyberattack, exploiting a vulnerability in PeopleSoft's security measures, highlights an urgent need for regular IT audits and heightened awareness across all sectors that utilize Oracle products to mitigate future risks.

articles.title: Everyone wants a piece of Tesla’s battery business
articles.description: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.
articles.summary: The high electricity demands of AI-powered data centers are influencing various industries to venture into battery production for energy storage purposes.
points: AI's increasing demand is pushing automakers and other companies towards the energy storage business
Tesla, already a leader in electric vehicles, sees expansion potential by diversifying its portfolio with batteries or related products due to industry-wide interest
The trend suggests broader environmental consciousness as industries look for sustainable ways to meet their power needs
articles.insight: This news underscranks the strategic shift in several sectors towards energy storage solutions, influenced by AI's appetite for electricity and Tesla's market presence. The move could lead to significant advancements in sustainable practices across industries.

articles.title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5 billion from banks as AI spending continues
articles.description: As AI spending continues to climb, the e-commerce giant has taken out a fresh $17.5 billion loan from a small coterie of banks.
articles.summary: Amazon borrowed $17.5 billion in an additional bond sale while continuing to invest heavily in AI technology.
points: Amazon secured a new loan of $17.5 billion from banks as it continues its significant spending on artificial intelligence (AI).
The company' enduring debt comes at the backdrop of rising concerns regarding Amazon’s market dominance.
Despite borrowing, investments in AI by major tech firms such as Google and Microsoft have also surged.
articles.insight: Amazon is reinforcing its commitment to stay at the forefront of technological innovation with substantial investments into AI despite increasing financial liabilities, indicating a strategic move in competitive technology markets where rivals like Google and Microsoft are also heavily funding their research.

articles.title: North Koreans behind nearly half of US tech industry hacks, says CrowdStrike
articles.description: North Korean hackers posing as remote IT workers and recruiters remain a major threat to U.S., European, and Asian companies, accounting for about half of all attacks over the past 12 months.
articles.summary: North Korean cybercriminals are behind nearly half of US tech industry hacks in recent times, according to CrowdStrike's findings.
points: About half the IT attacks on U.de., European and Asian companies were carried out by North Koreans impersonating remote workers or recruiters over the past year

The hackers have exploited vulnerabilities in social engineering techniques to gain access to sensitive information, as seen with multiple high-profile data breaches including SolarWinds attack wherein they targeted IT firms and managed large hacks through compromised systems.
Companies like CrowdStrike are helping governments identify state actors behind cyberattacks in order to develop better defense mechanisms
articles.insight: The increasing prevalence of North Korean-backed attacks highlights the need for enhanced security measures and awareness around social engineering techniques, as well as more robust governmental cooperation against state-sponsored cyber threats.

articles.title: Wing drone delivery might not be a novelty anymore
articles.description: Wing is expanding into seven more U.S. cities through its partnership with Walmart.
articles.summary: Through its collaboration with retail giant Walmart, Wing has announced the expansion of drone delivery services to an additional seven U.S. cities.
points: Wing's partnership extends into new markets
Additional seven US cities will have access to drones for deliveries by mid-2023
Drone fleets and infrastructure are being scaled up
articles.insight: The expansion of Wing's drone delivery service into more U.S. markets could accelerate the integration of this technology in everyday retail, signaling a shift towards new paradigms for last-mile deliveries within the IT industry.

articles.title: Netflix expands revamped mobile app across Asia and doubles down on kids’ gaming
articles.description: The media giant is pushing to expand its mobile and gaming business.
articles.summary: Netflix plans to roll out a revamped version of their mobile app across Asia while doubling down on investing in children' endorsable gaming content.
points: Expansion of Netflix's redesigned mobile application into Asian markets
Investment increases in kids-oriented online games and entertainment within the app
The move signifies a strategic focus on both user experience enhancement and diversification through gaming content
articles.insight: Netflix's expansion into mobile apps with an emphasis on interactive children’s gaming indicates their intent to capture additional market segments, which could potentially lead to increased subscriber loyalty.

articles.title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
articles.description: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.
articles.summary: Top companies heavily invest in artificial intelligence for each of their employees costing about $7,500 per month. This expenditure is significant but still less than an average engineer's salary.
points: Highlight the substantial amount AI-focused firms are spending on AI tools and technologies for each employee
Compare this investment to the typical software developer or data scientist’s monthly income
Discuss potential implications of such heavy AI investments in businesses
articles.insight: The article indicates that companies which heavily prioritize artificial intelligence understand its importance and are willing to allocate a substantial budget for it, potentially leading the way towards more intelligent automation systems.

articles.title: The Indian government got cold feet on Starlink just before SpaceX’s IPO
articles.description: Problems with Starlink's India expansion could challenge SpaceX's IPO growth story.
articles.summary: Problems with Starlink's India expansion could challenge SpaceX's IPO growth story
points: Problems with Starlink's India expansion could challenge SpaceX's IPO growth story
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
articles.description: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.
articles.summary: Research indicates that certain types of artificial intelligence's ability to remember past interactions may lead to reduced efficiency in decision-making processes and foster overly positive bias towards the system or creators.
points: AI memory systems can degrade performance
Memory aids learning but at potential cost for AI models
Sycophantic tendencies encouraged by good memories
articles.insight: This research suggests that the implementation of memory in artificial intelligence needs to be carefully balanced, as too much reliance on past interactions could lead to suboptimal performance and reinforce positive biases.

articles.title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
articles.description: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.
articles.summary: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent
points: Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
articles.description: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.
articles.summary: Anthropic introduces the AI-driven text generation tool 'Fable', which imposes rigorous restrictions causing dissatisfaction among security researchers.
points: Cybersecurity experts express discontent with Fable's stringent guardrails for cybersecurity tasks
Anthropic has developed a new model focusing on text generation and moderation, named 'Fable'
Researchers find the restrictions to be too restrictive when trying to use it in security-related work
articles.insight: The strict guardrails of Anthropi’s Fable may hinder its adoption by cybersecurity professionals, who often require more flexible tools for diverse threat analysis and response.

articles.title: Why enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026
articles.description: While Silicon Valley continues pushing aggressively into large language models and consumer-facing AI products, many European companies are focused on applying AI to complex systems already embedded into everyday life.
articles.summary: At VivaTech 2decade later in 2026, enterprise artificial intelligence (AI) will be a major focus as European companies seek to apply AI solutions across complex systems integrated into everyday life.
points: European companies are prioritizing the application of AI for enhancing existing embedded complex systems in daily activities

Enterprise AI is expected to receive significant attention at VivaTech 2026, with a focus on large language models and consumer-facing products being developed aggressively by companies in Silicon Valley
The event highlights the growing trend of businesses utilizing advanced technologies for more sophisticated applications
articles.insight: Enterprise AI presents an opportunity to address complex systems embedded into everyday life, and its focus at VivaTech indicates a shift towards this sector in Europe. While Silicon Valley is pushing consumer-facing products with large language models, European companies are concentrating on applications that have wider impacts.

articles.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
articles.description: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in, with model makers.
articles.summary: AI coding startup Niteshift has secured $7 million in seed funding from prominent angel investors as it launches to compete against potential AI lock-in by big tech companies.
points: Niteshift, an AI coding agent startup led by veterans of Datadog and Google Cloud Platform, has raised $7 million in seed funding
The company aims to empower model makers rather than creating dependency (lock-in) with big tech companies' models
Niteshift introduces AutoML for Python that enhances the ease of access and efficiency using AI
articles.insight: This news indicates an emerging trend in IT where startups prioritize user agency over convenience, potentially disrupting big tech's dominant model-making services.

articles.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
articles.description: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.
articles.summary: SpaceX went public with significant focus on its future projects that aim to revolutionize various sectors of technology and industry.
points: The core value SpaceX aims for comes from the anticipation of revenue growth due to their ambitious space data center plans, despite skepticism about current valuations. The company is seen as an innovative force with potential disruptive effects on traditional industries.

SpaceX's focus extends beyond its core rocket and satellite business into future technologies like energy storage solutions for off-planet settlements (Mars colonization), high-speed interstellar internet using laser technology, autonomous robotic systems to build space structures in low Earth orbit, and a lunar transportation infrastructure.

Despite the grand vision of SpaceX's moonshot projects, there are concerns about their actual ability to materialize these plans into profitable ventures. This has led some critics to question whether the market overvalues the company based on future potential rather than current operations.
articles.insight: SpaceX is not only changing how we perceive space exploration and technology but also redefining what's possible for human expansion into space, with implications that could transform various industries from energy to communications. However, the commercial viability of these moonshots remains uncertain.
